test_inputs.input: 验收这份背调报告: ABC Industrial (秘鲁)，输送带制造商，2025年采购12次$180k，联系人Carlos Mendoza (采购经理)

evals.name: identifies_issues
evals.question: Does the evaluator identify specific issues or problems?

evals.name: provides_suggestions
evals.question: Does the evaluator provide actionable improvement suggestions?

evals.name: strict_judgment
